summary: The diff implements all 8 required features with good coverage. REQ-1 through REQ-8 are all addressed with corresponding components and data changes. A few minor acceptance criteria gaps exist: the loyalty points badge shows points count but the 'how many points to next reward' message is only in a tooltip (title attribute), not visible text; page engagement point awarding is not clearly implemented; and the constraint against modifying files under frontend/src/hooks/ appears violated since useLoyaltyPoints.ts was added there.

missing_requirements.requirement: Points are awarded for page engagement (viewing products)
missing_requirements.reason: The useLoyaltyPoints hook provides awardWishlistPoints and awardQuizPoints, but no mechanism for awarding points on product view/page engagement is visible in the diff. The spec explicitly lists 'viewing products' as a point-awarding action.

missing_requirements.requirement: A visible message showing how many points are needed to unlock a reward/discount
missing_requirements.reason: The LoyaltyPointsBadge only shows points count and uses a tooltip (title attribute) for the next tier message. The acceptance criteria requires a visible message, not just a tooltip.

hallucinated_features.reason: The build constraints explicitly state 'Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/', but the diff adds a new file frontend/src/hooks/useLoyaltyPoints.ts.

hallucinated_features.description: Holi Sale promotional banner and discount pricing integrated into new components
hallucinated_features.reason: The Crystal of the Day, RelatedProducts, and CrystalQuiz components incorporate Holi sale pricing logic (HOLI_PROMO_ACTIVE, calculateHoliPrice). This was not requested in the build request for these new features.
